'''Kaloor Cofi''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Kaloor Cofi was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and later made a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Active during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], a growing division between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Cofi accepted missions on behalf of the High Council which took the Jedi across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. One such mission began when the High Council was contacted by the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] representative, Emissary [[Nathanjo Nirrelz]] of [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]]. Reporting to Coruscant that the terrorist group known as the [[Roshu Sune/Legends|Roshu Sune]] had [[Gotal hostage standoff|taken hostages]] during a [[Battle of Antar 4 (Separatist Crisis)|battle]] on the planet, Nirrelz begged the Jedi to intervene.<ref name="Hnn53" />

Cofi was dispatched as part of a six-member Jedi task force to the Gotal colony world [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]], under the leadership of fellow Jedi Knight, [[Sarrissa Jeng/Legends|Sarrissa Jeng]]. Once there, Kofi and the team of [[Jedi Diplomat|diplomats]] were to negotiate the release of Nirrelz. During the negotiations, a group of unaffiliated vigilantes opened fire on the Roshu Shone guerrillas. This attack panicked the Gotal separatists, who opened fire on their captives. Leaping to defend the unarmed hostages, the Jedi managed to subdue the guerrillas on their [[Passenger liner/Legends|commuter hopper]], but not before Cofi and [[Antyard-Wo Shissan]] lost their lives. Survived by his colleagues, including Jeng and a [[Unidentified Mon Calamari Jedi Knight|Mon Calamari Jedi Knight]], Cofi's body was transported to the [[Jedi chapter house (Aleen Minor)|Order's chapter house]] on [[Aleen Minor/Legends|Aleen Minor]] for the [[Jedi funeral/Legends|cremating]]. Meanwhile, across the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] network, the Jedi were heavily criticized by [[Gotal Foreign Affairs Commune]] leader [[Shagrad Loset]] for what he saw as meddling in an internal affair. Rebuffing this assault on the Order, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and High Council member [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] commended the Jedi effort on Atzerri.<ref name="Hnn53" />
